title: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
summary: It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown . The bundle also notably includes three games from the Borderlands universe.
